## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes locally
- [ ] New behavior has tests (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, or real production PII in the diff
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] Vendor PRs include sample JSON + `.env.example` entry (see [adding-a-vendor.md](../docs/adding-a-vendor.md))
